title: Bonemeal Item Fix
description: Fixes the Bonemeal to have the same color as the bone.
body: This Pack aims to fix bug [MC-265678](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-265678) This is done by making the bonemeal use the same colors as the bone. *If you want to make is so the bone uses the same colors as the bonemeal then go [here.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bone-item-fix)
